schema.description: This endpoint is only accessible with Harvest API keys (non-OAuth) to support migrations into Harvest v3. We will deprecate this endpoint when Harvest v1/v2 is deprecated. For more information, see our Authentication Guide and both our READ and WRITE Migration Guides.

parameters.description: Cursor link for pagination from previous page response header. Do not use any other parameters when using this.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma separated list of fields to return
